headlines.title: Steve Kornacki: America 250 poll shows nation marked by doubt and pessimism
headlines.description: NBC News chief data analyst Steve Kornacki joins Meet the Press to break down a new NBC News poll ahead of the nation’s 250 birthday next month, with most saying the U.S. has already seen its best days and over one-fifth of respondents saying they are only a little or not at all proud to be Americans.

headlines.title: Democrats maintain an edge in the fight for Congress as Trump gets poor marks
headlines.description: President Donald Trump’s poor approval rating continues to weigh down his party ahead of the midterms — though the GOP has a slim measure of separation from the president, with Democrats holding a 5-point lead in the battle for control of Congress, according to a new national NBC News poll

headlines.title: Poll: 57% of Americans Disapprove of Trump’s Job Performance
headlines.description: Meet the Press Moderator Kristen Welker joins Sunday TODAY’s Willie Geist to discuss new NBC News polling that shows how Americans feel about President Donald Trump’s job performance amid the war in Iran and ahead of the country’s 250 birthday. “That’s a new low for his second term and of course it does come, as we know, as this war is deeply unpopular, that President Trump has been underwater in his handling of the economy,” Kirsten says.

headlines.title: 12 presumed dead in plane crash near Kansas City, Missouri
headlines.description: Butler county sheriff Brad Anderson answers questions about a plane crash near Kansas City, Missouri. According to Missouri State Highway Patrol, all 12 people on board the plane are presumed dead.

headlines.title: Morocco’s draw against Brazil showed its potential to be the World Cup’s ultimate dark horse
headlines.description: Four years after becoming the first Arab team to reach the World Cup semifinals, Morocco arrives with a roster of European stars — including Real Madrid’s Brahim Diaz and captain Achraf Hakimi, fresh of a Champions League title with Paris-St. Germain.

headlines.title: The smallest nation ever to qualify for the World Cup didn’t do it alone
headlines.description: Curaçao will make its World Cup debut this month as the smallest nation ever to qualify for the tournament, thanks to its connection to the Netherlands.

headlines.title: Coaching the U.S. was a big test for Mauricio Pochettino. Then his World Cup opener went ‘amazing.’
headlines.description: Pochettino, a 54-year-old Argentine, has been on the job for 20 months, but Friday’s game was unquestionably his biggest opportunity to make an impression on a wider fanbase tuning in to watch the U.S. for the first time.

headlines.title: Folarin Balogun chose the U.S. over England. It’s already paying off in the World Cup.
headlines.description: Folarin Balogun, born in Brooklyn but raised in London, agreed to play his international career with the Americans in 2023. Three years later he opened the World Cup with two goals.

headlines.title: 12 people presumed dead after skydiving plane crashes in Missouri
headlines.description: All 12 people on board a skydiving plane that crashed Sunday morning shortly after takeoff in Butler, Missouri, are presumed dead, according to Missouri State Highway Patrol.

headlines.title: Dick Advocaat: “No debemos avergonzarnos”
headlines.description: Aceptando que se enfrentaron con un equipo de calidad, el entrenador neerlandés de Curazao, Dick Advocaat, dice que concedieron los goles a Alemania con demasiada facilidad. Afirma que el juego sirve como lección para próximos enfrentamientos.

headlines.title: ¡No faltes! Japón y Países Bajos ya tienen todo listo para su arranque mundialista
headlines.description: La Selección de Japón y los neerlandeses, están calentando los motores para un partido espectacular en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026.

headlines.title: Alemania golea sin piedad a Curazao en su debut mundialista
headlines.description: Fue una arrolladora goleada del conjunto que comanda Julian Nagelsmann frente al equipo caribeño que debuta en Copas del Mundo.
